settings.heading: Trophies & Awards for Government Departments
settings.subheading: Recognition, Republic/Independence Day, sports and service awards for government departments and PSUs — GST-invoiced, PO-based, with tender-style documentation. Pan-India by Meru Trophy.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy supplies government departments and PSUs with recognition, national-day, sports and service awards — GST-invoiced, PO-based, with tender-style documentation and pan-India delivery. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: Awards built for government departments
settings.text: Government and PSU orders need clean procurement. We provide GST invoices, PO-based ordering and the tender-style documentation departments require, across recognition, Republic/Independence Day, sports and long-service awards. Bulk-capable and reliably delivered nationwide, with our bulk-order process built for institutions.

settings.title: Procurement-ready

settings.title: All award types
settings.text: Recognition, national-day, sports and service awards.

settings.question: Do you handle PO-based government orders?
settings.answer: Yes — PO-based ordering with GST invoices and tender-style documentation.

settings.question: Can you provide required certifications/paperwork?
settings.answer: We provide GST invoices and standard documentation; tell us your tender requirements.

settings.heading: Need awards for government departments?
settings.text: Tell us your requirement and date — we'll share relevant past work and a quote, usually within the hour.
